Hello there! Saw this game is having an anniversary soon and the visuals got me very interested. Apologies if this question has been asked ad nauseum before, but is this the kind of game where it's better to start now in prep for the anni or start right when the anni begins?
prep now
More or less now cause the free pulls is equivalent to your story completion

50 log in
50 to complete chapter 6
And 50 complete arc 1

in my experience, the main reason to start games during a major milestone event rather than before is for rerollers, since the extra up-front resources make it much easier to reroll for good starter accounts
given that context, this is a game with incredibly generous gacha rates compared to the mainstream standard, so there's not really much reason or benefit to rerolling

rerolling at most gets you a 1-2 SSRs headstart, but the rates in this game are 3% ssr with 30 pity so that headstart is negated pretty quickly and you miss out on a lot more rolls by starting later than by starting now
Thank you all for the answers! I appreciate the insight
Is it worth it to level up covenants before substats are unlocked at Keeper Level 55?
Yes

Is this wheel any good?
Goated
Ok so it's worth doing the event then? I just started the game lol
Event are always worth
Event wheels are very rare, best to +12 it when you see it

You want to spend Stamina on Event as soon as you unlock it, and never look back on Mat Stages. Dittoing Aurora, try to +12 Purple Event Wheels as they are limited to only the event, and some are as powerful Golden WoDs.
Would it be a good wheel on tawil?
If you don’t have her Signature Wheel of Destiny or Dps Wheels, then sure
Ideally, you want to put it on a support thats your Keyflare bot
ahh I see, yeah I already have her signature wheel
Tawil is a your Dps
So in this case put it on celeste or something?
Whoever has your highest Keyflare Regen Stat
The Tawil Purple Event WoD does(read), “Gain 300/400/500% of the Keyflare Regen based on this Awakener upon entering a battle. Repeat on first Posse”
Due to how this functions, you want to put it on your Keyflare character, which should have the most Keyflare/Skey Gen.
What does first posse mean, sorry for the dumb question lol
Your Posse is the button on the bottom left which activates a Exalt, in a sense, by using 1000 Skey
Skey is generated(normally) by playing cards. The Skey Stat itself makes it so each card played by that Awakener generates more Skey.
So wouldn't you want it on tawil since you can use her exalt more?
Tawil has her own Exalt. Posse is your personal team  Exalt.
Tawil Exalt is top left. Posse is bottom left.
as a new player, how farshould i get in the story to get to a good point to accumulate weekly/daily resources? should i prioritize unlocking the phantasmal dive?
Prioritizing unlocking dive sounds like a good idea
Your daily is dive or traphase + 50 cards played + event
If you use skip ticket on dive then the 50 cards play thing gets skipped too
What's does 50 cards played mean?
Play 50 cards in a day
Ahhh gotcha. Thank you! ❤️
